title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Select Device link
scenario: Tapping "Select Device" with no device connected shows supported devices list with images and an "Other devices" button linking to Poly support page.
steps: Observe the list of supported devices displayed with their images.
Check the bottom of the list for an 'Other devices' button.
Verify that the Poly support web page opens.
expected: A list of supported devices with images is displayed, and an "Other devices" button at the bottom opens the Poly support web page when tapped.
